basic_details.job_title: DRDO HEMRL Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 40 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: High Energy Materials Research Laboratory (DRDO HEMRL)
basic_details.short_information: The High Energy Materials Research Laboratory (HEMRL), Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) has published the Paid Intern Notification 2026–27 under Advertisement No. HEMRL/HRD/PDINTERN/2026-27. The recruitment drive aims to fill 40 Paid Intern positions. Candidates up to the age of 28 years and currently pursuing a full-time Graduate or Post Graduate program in Engineering or Science (Physics/Chemistry only) from a recognized Indian University/Institute are eligible to apply. Interested applicants can apply through the official DRDO website (https://www.drdo.gov.in). The appli

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Pursuing Graduate/Post Graduate in Engineering and Science (Physics/Chemistry only), full time course from a recognized Indian University/Institute (Final year students only)
qualification.details: Candidates must be pursuing a full-time Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Engineering or Science (Physics/Chemistry only) from a recognized Indian University/Institute. Only final year students are eligible to apply.

salary_details.details: The selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000 Per Month.

selection_process: Merit based on academic record (>=70% or >=7.5 CGPA) Referral letter from Principal/Director Shortlisting Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO HEMRL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DRDO HEMRL Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO HEMRL Paid Intern positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DRDO HEMRL Paid Intern positions is July 3, 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Paid Intern role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be pursuing a full-time Graduate or Post Graduate degree in Engineering or Science (specifically Physics or Chemistry) from a recognized Indian University or Institute. Only final year students are eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Paid Intern positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Paid Intern positions is 28 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Paid Intern position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Paid Intern position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 5000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Paid Intern role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies available for the Paid Intern positions across various engineering and science disciplines at DRDO HEMRL.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Paid Intern positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves merit-based shortlisting on academic records, a referral letter from the Principal/Director, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the DRDO HEMRL Paid Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the High Energy Materials Research Laboratory (DRDO HEMRL) located?
faq.answer: The High Energy Materials Research Laboratory (DRDO HEMRL) is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411021.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the internship training?
faq.answer: The internship training is scheduled to commence on August 1, 2026. Specific duration details are not provided in the current data.
